tracks.rawText: 1:40recording-1768507927988UploadA spoken word motivational piece featuring a deep, resonant male voice with a clear, authoritative Spanish accent, The background is a minimalist ambient soundscape consisting of a low-frequency drone and subtle, rhythmic percussive clicks that mimic the sound of a ticking clock or a metronome, The vocal is dry with a slight room reverb, positioned front and center in the mix to emphasize the intellectual and philosophical content, The tempo is a steady 90 BPM, providing a rhythmic cadence to the speech, There are no melodic instruments or chord progressions, focusing entirely on the vocal delivery and the atmospheric texture of the background noise, The production is clean and professional, with high vocal clarity and a balanced frequency spectrum2PublishRemix
tracks.title: recording-1768507927988
